overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The scene features prominent neon advertisements including a large 'NiCola' wall, outdoor cafe seating, elevated monorail tracks with passing trains, and cyberpunk architecture with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with outdoor cafe seating

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past the large illuminated NiCola advertisement wall

notable_agents.action: seated at outdoor cafe table under white umbrella
walking past camera wearing red jacket and white pants

outdoor seating area with yellow and purple checkered floor pattern and white umbrellas
curved elevated highway or monorail support structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway dominated by a massive illuminated NiCola advertisement on the left. To the right, an outdoor cafe patio with checkered flooring and seated patrons extends toward the open plaza. The space is semi-sheltered with mixed lighting from the fading dusk sky and artificial neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza under elevated monorail tracks

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with visible sky and prominent monorail structure overhead
approaching pedestrian in orange outfit walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the curved monorail structure ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket and white shorts walking away from camera toward the monorail

entered.detail: curved elevated monorail track with large support pillars spanning across the plaza
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
modern yellow bench seating along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open plaza with full sky visibility. A massive curved monorail track dominates the overhead space, while digital billboards and yellow benches line the path. The lighting shifts to natural dusk as the character follows a pedestrian in an orange jacket toward the center of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway under curved monorail track with advertising kiosks

events.description: monorail train with multiple cars passes overhead on the elevated track
passing two pedestrians walking together in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking under the monorail tracks as a train passes overhead, approaching a concrete bridge structure

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together toward the underpass ahead

entered.detail: futuristic monorail train with multiple cars moving along the overhead track
solid concrete bridge structure spanning the walkway ahead
tall thin digital advertising pillar with illuminated screen

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the curved monorail track as a train passes overhead, creating a dynamic overhead element. The environment features concrete architecture with digital advertising kiosks and palm trees lining the path. The character approaches and passes other pedestrians while moving toward a concrete pedestrian bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian underpass with illuminated stairs and purple neon lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass area with prominent purple neon lighting on building facades
approaching illuminated concrete stairs with pedestrians ascending

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated stairs under the overpass, passing by neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian ascending the illuminated concrete stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with illuminated edges leading upward under the overpass
building facade with prominent purple neon strip lighting and pink signage
large horizontal digital screen displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more enclosed underpass area dominated by vibrant purple neon lighting from a building on the left. The scene features illuminated concrete stairs leading upward, with pedestrians ascending toward the overhead walkway. Large digital billboards continue to line the right side while the monorail track recedes into the right background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon walkway into a wide urban plaza and finally into a vibrant, purple-lit underpass. It begins along a covered pedestrian path dominated by a massive illuminated NiCola advertisement and an adjacent outdoor cafe with checkered flooring. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the space opens into a vast plaza under a dusk sky, where the view expands to reveal yellow benches and a massive curved monorail track overhead. The movement continues beneath the track as a train passes above, gliding past digital kiosks and palm trees toward a concrete bridge structure. Finally, the scene shifts into a more enclosed underpass area where the lighting transforms into a deep purple glow, passing illuminated stairs and ascending pedestrians as the monorail recedes into the background.
